# Grounded by live API capture captures/20260415T162822Z-api_reconnect_active_order_aapl.
# server_version=200, events.jsonl sha256 prefix: 9d72a4711c25c788.
# This replay keeps the original in-memory OrderHandle alive across transport
# loss, then cancels through that handle after reconnect.
handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260415 18:28:23 Central European Standard Time"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU9000001"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":294}

client place_order {"order_id":"294","contract":{"con_id":"265598","symbol":"AAPL","sec_type":"STK","exchange":"SMART","currency":"USD"},"action":"BUY","total_quantity":"10","order_type":"LMT","lmt_price":"13.27","tif":"GTC","account":"DU9000001"}
server open_order {"order_id":294,"account":"DU9000001","contract":{"con_id":265598,"symbol":"AAPL","sec_type":"STK","exchange":"SMART","currency":"USD","local_symbol":"AAPL","trading_class":"NMS"},"action":"BUY","order_type":"LMT","quantity":"10","filled":"0","remaining":"0","lmt_price":"13.27","aux_price":"0","tif":"GTC","perm_id":"1426086045","client_id":"1","origin":"0"}
server order_status {"order_id":294,"status":"Submitted","filled":"0","remaining":"10","avg_fill_price":"0","perm_id":"1426086045","parent_id":"0","last_fill_price":"0","client_id":"1","why_held":"","mkt_cap_price":"0"}
disconnect

handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260415 18:28:34 Central European Standard Time"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU9000001"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":295}

client cancel_order {"field_count":"5","order_id":"294","manual_order_cancel_time":"","ext_operator":"","manual_order_indicator":""}
server order_status {"order_id":294,"status":"Cancelled","filled":"0","remaining":"10","avg_fill_price":"0","perm_id":"1426086045","parent_id":"0","last_fill_price":"0","client_id":"1","why_held":"","mkt_cap_price":"0"}
server api_error {"req_id":294,"code":202,"message":"Order Canceled - reason:","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":"1776270516000"}

sleep 100ms
disconnect
